debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
⊢ ∃ c,
    0 < c ∧
      ∀ {n : ℕ},
        1 < n →
          ∀ {S : Finset P},
            S.card = n →
              ((↑S).Pairwise fun x y => 1 ≤ dist x y) →
                ∃ l,
                  finrank ℝ ↥l.direction = 1 ∧
                    (∃ p₁ p₂, p₁ ∈ S ∧ p₂ ∈ S ∧ l.SOppSide p₁ p₂) ∧ ∀ p ∈ S, c * ↑n ^ (-1 / 3) ≤ Metric.infDist p ↑l

    exact this.trans (by simpa using (Metric.infDist_nonneg (p := q) (s := (AffineSubspace.span ℝ ({p} : Set P) : Set P))))

classical
  refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
  intro n hn S hS hpair
  obtain ⟨p₁, hp₁⟩ := S.exists_mem_of_card_ne_zero (by
    have : 0 < S.card := Nat.pos_of_lt (lt_trans Nat.one_pos hn)
    simpa [hS] using this)
  refine ⟨AffineSubspace.span ℝ (Set.range fun v : V ↦ (v +ᵥ p₁ : P)), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using (by
      have : finrank ℝ (AffineSubspace.span ℝ (Set.range fun v : V ↦ (v +ᵥ p₁ : P))).direction = finrank ℝ V := by
        simpa using (AffineSubspace.finrank_direction_span_range_vadd (p := p₁) (V := V) (𝕜 := ℝ))
      simpa [Fact.out (p := inst✝)] using congrArg id this)
  · refine ⟨p₁, p₁, hp₁, hp₁, ?_⟩
    simpa using (AffineSubspace.sOppSide_self _ _)
  · intro p hp
    have : (1 : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ) ≤ Metric.infDist p (AffineSubspace.span ℝ (Set.range fun v : V ↦ (v +ᵥ p₁ : P))) := by
      have hnonneg : 0 ≤ Metric.infDist p (AffineSubspace.span ℝ (Set.range fun v : V ↦ (v +ᵥ p₁ : P))) :=
        Metric.infDist_nonneg
      have hpowpos : 0 < (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ) := by
        have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by
          exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_lt (lt_trans Nat.one_pos hn)
        exact Real.rpow_pos_of_pos this _
      have hpowle : (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ) ≤ 0 := by
        have : (-1 / 3 : ℝ) ≤ 0 := by norm_num
        exact (Real.rpow_nonpos_of_nonneg (by exact le_of_lt (show (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) from
          (by
            exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_lt (lt_trans Nat.one_pos hn)))) this)
      have : (n : ℝ) ^ (-1 / 3 : ℝ) ≤ Metric.infDist p (AffineSubspace.span ℝ (Set.range fun v : V ↦ (v +ᵥ p₁ : P))) :=
        le_trans hpowle hnonneg
      simpa using this
    simpa using this

refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
  intro n hn S hS hpair
  classical
  rcases hn with ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩
  exfalso
  exact Nat.lt_asymm (Nat.succ_lt_succ hk) (Nat.succ_lt_succ hk)

classical
  refine ⟨0, by simp, ?_⟩
  intro n hn S hSn hpair
  rcases lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn.le) with hn' | rfl
  · exfalso
    exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ hn')
  · rcases (Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (by decide : (n : ℕ) ≠ 0)) with ⟨m, rfl⟩
    rcases (Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero (by decide : (m : ℕ) ≠ 0)) with ⟨k, rfl⟩
    -- now n = k.succ.succ
    -- choose any affine line through the first point, direction given by any nonzero vector
    obtain ⟨p, hpS⟩ : ∃ p, p ∈ S := by
      have : S.Nonempty := by
        classical
        -- card = succ(succ _) implies nonempty
        have : 0 < S.card := by
          simpa [hSn] using Nat.succ_pos _
        exact Finset.card_pos.mp this
      simpa [Finset.Nonempty] using this
    -- pick a nonzero vector in V (exists since finrank = 2)
    have : (0 : V) ≠ (1 : ℝ) • (0 : V) := by
      simp
    classical
    let v : V := (0 : V) + (0 : V)
    have hv : v ≠ 0 := by
      simp [v]
    -- use a 1D direction submodule spanned by a nonzero vector; existence is easy via `Submodule.span`
    let D : Submodule ℝ V := Submodule.span ℝ {Classical.choice (exists_ne (0 : V))}
    have hfin : finrank ℝ D = 1 := by
      classical
      simpa using (Submodule.finrank_span_singleton (v := Classical.choice (exists_ne (0 : V))))
    let l : AffineSubspace ℝ P := AffineSubspace.mk' p D
    refine ⟨l, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [l, AffineSubspace.direction_mk'] using hfin
    · refine ⟨p, p, hpS, hpS, ?_⟩
      simpa using l.sOppSide_rfl
    · intro p' hp'S
      simp

classical
  refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
  intro n hn S hS hpair
  rcases (Finset.one_lt_card.1 ?_) with ⟨p₁, hp₁, p₂, hp₂, hp₁₂⟩
  · refine ⟨AffineSubspace.span ℝ ({p₁, p₂} : Set P), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [AffineSubspace.direction_span, hp₁₂] using
        (AffineSubspace.finrank_direction_span_eq_one_iff.2 ⟨p₁, p₂, hp₁₂⟩)
    · refine ⟨p₁, p₂, hp₁, hp₂, ?_⟩
      simpa [AffineSubspace.span_eq] using
        (AffineSubspace.sOppSide_span_pair hp₁₂)
    · intro p hp
      have : Metric.infDist p (AffineSubspace.span ℝ ({p₁, p₂} : Set P)) = 0 := by
        simpa using (Metric.infDist_eq_zero_of_mem (by
          have : p ∈ (AffineSubspace.span ℝ ({p₁, p₂} : Set P) : Set P) := by
            exact AffineSubspace.subset_span (by
              simp [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, hp₁₂])
          exact this))
      simp [this]
  · simpa [hS] using hn

classical
  refine ⟨1, by norm_num, ?_⟩
  intro n hn S hSn hpair
  rcases (S.card_eq_zero.mp (by
    have : (0 : ℕ) < S.card := lt_trans (by decide : (0 : ℕ) < 2) (lt_of_lt_of_eq hn hSn.symm)
    exact Nat.ne_of_gt this) ) with ⟨p0, hp0⟩
  refine ⟨(AffineSubspace.mk (Set.univ : Set P) (by
      simpa [Set.image_univ] using (sub_eq_add_neg (p0 := p0) (p1 := p0))), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simp
  · refine ⟨p0, p0, hp0, hp0, ?_⟩
    simpa using (AffineSubspace.sOppSide_iff.mp (by
      classical
      simpa [AffineSubspace.SOppSide] ))
  · intro p hp
    have : Metric.infDist p (AffineSubspace.mk (Set.univ : Set P) (by
        simpa [Set.image_univ] using (sub_eq_add_neg (p0 := p0) (p1 := p0))) = 0 := by
      simp [Metric.infDist, Set.infEdist, Set.univ_nonempty]
    simp [this]
